target: (The day of this year's summer festival at Hito Shrine...)
(This year, the idol Kaori Koyuba-chan is also here, so there's an even bigger crowd than usual.)
(According to Ushio and Mio, her coming to a local event like this is nothing short of a miracle.)
(What surprised me even more was that she's originally from this island and was our classmate.)
Shinpei, over here, over here! How long does it take you to buy some food!
There was a huge line for the takoyaki.
But I was really surprised. To think that Kaori-chan would become an idol.
But Shinpei, you didn't remember Kaori-chan, did you?
Look, let's focus on the takoyaki. If we don't eat it soon, it'll get cold.
No, I mean, why is there only this much!
What do you mean "only this much"... How much do you plan on eating!
Ehh!? But you promised back then!
You said you'd buy me 10 or even 100—
...Huh? When did we make that promise...? I feel like I can almost remember!
You know, when you got into that narrow gap—
